    Mark Ng

    Control engineering, techs, photography, more nerd stuff, and then some…



    Photo taken at the base of the Abisko Sky Station, Sweden during summer of 2014 at time 0100. The midnight Sun cast its golden rays on the clouds, producing a majestic fire-like glow.

    Mark Kok Yew Ng

    Reader, Ulster University.

    Recent Updates

    CFP for ISSC 2024

    14 Feb 2024

    Mark Ng is part of the Programme Committee for the 35th Irish Signals and Systems Conference (ISSC 2024).

    Niamh’s Successful PhD Viva

    17 Nov 2023

    The team celebrate today with Niamh passing her PhD viva, with her thesis subject to just minor amendments!

    CFP for IEEE CCTA 2024

    15 Nov 2023

    Mark Ng is the Workshop Chair for the 2024 IEEE Conference on Control Technology and Applications, now in its 8th year.

    CFP for IEEE SPMB 2023

    09 Jun 2023

    Mark Ng is the Technical Program Chair for the 2023 IEEE Signal Processing in Medicine and Biology Symposium, now in its 14th year.

    Preprint on Digital Twin for Grip Stability Prediction

    09 Feb 2023

    Stefanie’s work on developing a Digital Twin to generate data for grip stability prediction is now out as a preprint on arXiv.
